prompt: Create a computer graphic visualization of facial analysis: Use the abstract line style from image 2 for landmark points and lines. Apply the dramatic, high-contrast lighting of image 1 to illuminate a facial profile silhouette.
prompt_refined: Generate a computer graphic visualization of facial analysis. Depict a facial profile silhouette, strongly illuminated by the dramatic, high-contrast rim lighting and dark background reminiscent of image 1. Apply landmark points and lines to the profile using the thin, abstract, and minimalist line style seen in image 2.
objects: thin, abstract, and minimalist lines on the profile
